item21_financial_structure_detail.parent_chain: Hilton Franchise Holding LLC → Hilton Domestic Operating Company Inc. → Hilton Worldwide Holdings Inc. (NYSE: HLT)
item21_financial_structure_detail.entity_purpose: Single-purpose franchise IP licensing and fee collection
item21_financial_structure_detail.ip_source: Licensed royalty-free from Hilton International Holding LLC (HIH)
item21_financial_structure_detail.revenue_recognition: Royalty fees recognized as services provided (variable consideration, sales-based royalty). Upfront fees deferred over franchise contract term.
item21_financial_structure_detail.deferred_revenue_nature: Franchise application, sales, and COO fees recognized over contract life (10-22 years). Growing balance reflects healthy pipeline.
item21_financial_structure_detail.intercompany_dynamics: Franchisor collects fees from franchisees, remits to Hilton parent via retained earnings distributions. Large receivable ($703.9M) from Hilton affiliates represents operational cash managed at parent level.

balance_sheet.largest_asset: Other receivables due from Hilton affiliates ($703.9M, 55.4% of total assets)
balance_sheet.second_largest_asset: Franchise contracts, net ($392.7M) — franchise contract intangible assets acquired in 2024
balance_sheet.equity_structure: Contributed capital $310M + retained earnings $528.9M - due from affiliates ($262.0M) = $577.0M
balance_sheet.leverage: No external debt. All liabilities are operational (deferred revenue, franchise deposits, intercompany payables).
balance_sheet.cash_minimal: $317K — entity does not maintain significant cash; liquidity is at parent level

income_statement.expense_composition: Provision for credit losses ($6.2M), amortization ($3.8M), and operating expenses ($1.4M). Virtually no SG&A — all management functions performed by Hilton parent.
income_statement.termination_fee_spike_2024: $18.3M vs. $2.4M in 2023 — significant increase, possibly reflecting enforcement activity or portfolio cleanup

cash_flow.operating_cash_2024: $1,516.8M — virtually all revenue converts to operating cash
cash_flow.investing_2024: ($80.1M) — acquisition of franchise contract intangible assets (new in 2024)
cash_flow.financing_2024: ($1,441.7M) — dominated by $1.5B distribution to Hilton affiliates + $85.3M short-term note issuance

quality_assurance_annual_exposure.maximum_combined_note: Multiple QA fees can apply simultaneously. Total exposure can be material for underperforming hotels.

scenario_89_room_hi.note: Illustrative only — based on assumed GRR of ~$4,000/room/month (occupancy ~72% × $155 ADR ÷ 30 × 89 rooms × 6%)
